name: codex-background-studio
description: Install and manage a private, reversible media background for the Codex desktop app.

interface.shortDescription: Private image, GIF, and video backgrounds for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Install, launch, configure, verify, and uninstall a local Codex media background without modifying the official app bundle, app.asar, signatures, tasks, or authentication data.
defaultPrompt: Install Codex Background Studio on this computer.
Configure my Codex image, GIF, or video background.
Uninstall Codex Background Studio without deleting my media settings.
